column1: # GSE297116 — "Nuclear Argonaute:miRNA complexes recognize target sequences within
# chromatin and silence gene expression". AGO2 miR-eCLIP (Eclipsebio) in HCT116.
# Selection: wild-type HCT116, WHOLE CELL, IP libraries only.
#   - dropped `(input)`: size-matched controls, no AGO2 pulldown, so no chimeras
#   - dropped NLS-AGO2: engineered nuclear-localized AGO2, a different targetome
#   - dropped cytoplasm / chromatin fractions — those are in their own sheets,
# Each sample has two SRA runs — one deep run plus a small top-off of the same
# library — which stage 1 concatenates into a single FASTQ.
